must_detect.matched_text:
Purpose: onboarding of clients for corporate finance mandates on a UAE MTF; processing excludes MNPI beyond internal restricted-list flags.
Categories: Emirates ID image (verification only), trade licence details of signatory, name, business email, mobile, and deal-room access logs; data minimisation applied to exclude family-origin fields.
Control statement: No biometric templates are captured and no Emirates ID numbers are stored after verification is completed.
Cross-border transfer: limited support data may be accessed by Sandsphere Analytics Pvt. Ltd. (processor sub-contractor in Al Manal Tech Park, outside the UAE) for ticket triage, under PDPL-compliant transfer safeguards and standard clauses recognised in DIFC/ADGM.
Data-export approval HDC-TXP-26-04 signed by Ms. Mariam Al Najjar (DPO) on 2026-05-21; copies retained in the transfer register; contact: privacy.office@harbordunes.example.
must_detect.reason: promoted from strict runtime finding during Stage B baseline reconciliation
